text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The Mile Championship is finally upon us!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At long last and after three whole years, it is time
for her to reach the head of the Bakushin Road!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the goal of becoming the strongest miler,
Sakura Bakushin O is off with a Bakushin!
